'''nazhawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huckson|huckson]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huckson|huckson]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nazhawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhæwæth|næzhæwæth]] || [[word:næzhæwæj|næzhæwæj]] || [[word:næzhæwæsh|næzhæwæsh]] || [[word:næzhæwæ|næzhæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhazhawath|nazhazhawath]] || [[word:nazhazhawaj|nazhazhawaj]] || [[word:nazhazhawash|nazhazhawash]] || [[word:nazhazhawa|nazhazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhawath|nazhawath]] || [[word:nazhawaj|nazhawaj]] || [[word:nazhawash|nazhawash]] || [[word:nazhawa|nazhawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhafwath|nazhafwath]] || [[word:nazhafwaj|nazhafwaj]] || [[word:nazhafwash|nazhafwash]] || [[word:nazhafwaf|nazhafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhawatha|nazhawatha]] || [[word:nazhawaja|nazhawaja]] || [[word:nazhawasha|nazhawasha]] || [[word:nazhawaka|nazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhawath|nazhawath]] || [[word:nazhawaj|nazhawaj]] || [[word:nazhawash|nazhawash]] || [[word:nazhawa|nazhawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhawathal|nazhawathal]] || [[word:nazhawajal|nazhawajal]] || [[word:nazhawashal|nazhawashal]] || [[word:nazhawakal|nazhawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhawathatha|nazhawathatha]] || [[word:nazhawajaja|nazhawajaja]] || [[word:nazhawashasha|nazhawashasha]] || [[word:nazhawaka|nazhawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhawathan|nazhawathan]] || [[word:nazhawajan|nazhawajan]] || [[word:nazhawashan|nazhawashan]] || [[word:nazhawakan|nazhawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhawathaoro|nazhawathaoro]] || [[word:nazhawajaoro|nazhawajaoro]] || [[word:nazhawashaoro|nazhawashaoro]] || [[word:nazhawakaoro|nazhawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
